mnemonics: Unigram: Longest word you can think of is 'unigram' - Unique
Bigram: Longest word you can think of is 'bigram' - Big 'B' is for 'Big'
keyPoints: N-gram Model: Statistical Language Model - A sequence of N items from a given text
Paninion Framework: Panin's theory of grammar - 3 stages: Word formation, Word combination, Word interpretation
Karaka Theory: Karaka theory - 16 Karaka, 5 Varnas, 2 Varnas, 1 Samanya, 1 Pashu
